title: (* techmap_autopurge *) fails when techmap module has different sized port
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

Feature added in #1384. Testcase adapted from #1381.
```
read_verilog <<EOT
module sub(input i, output o, (* techmap_autopurge *) input [1:0] j);
foobar f(i, o, j);
endmodule
EOT
design -stash techmap

read_verilog <<EOT
(* blackbox *)
module sub(input i, output o, input j);
endmodule

(* blackbox *)
module foobar(input i, output o, input j);
endmodule

module top(input i, output o);
sub s0(i, o);
endmodule
EOT

techmap -map %techmap
hierarchy
check -assert
```

## Expected behavior

Fail gracefully (as happens when `(* techmap_autopurge *)` is not present.

## Actual behavior

```
 Yosys 0.9+431 (git sha1 2d781d06, clang 8.0.0-3 -fPIC -Os)


-- Executing script file `techmap.ys' --

1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend: <<EOT
Parsing Verilog input from `<<EOT' to AST representation.
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\sub'.
Successfully finished Verilog frontend.

2. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend: <<EOT
Parsing Verilog input from `<<EOT' to AST representation.
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\sub'.
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\foobar'.
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\top'.
Successfully finished Verilog frontend.

3. Executing TECHMAP pass (map to technology primitives).

3.1. Continuing TECHMAP pass.
Using template sub for cells of type sub.
<suppressed ~1 debug messages>
ERROR: Assert `wire && wire->width == 1' failed in ./kernel/rtlil.h:1457.

Breakpoint 1, __GI__exit (status=1) at ../sysdeps/unix/sysv/linux/_exit.c:27
27      ../sysdeps/unix/sysv/linux/_exit.c: No such file or directory.
(gdb) bt
#0  __GI__exit (status=1) at ../sysdeps/unix/sysv/linux/_exit.c:27
#1  0x00000000005c4d0b in Yosys::logv_error_with_prefix (prefix=0xba9ba9 "ERROR: ", format=0xb931e3 "Assert `%s' failed in %s:%d.\n", ap=<optimized out>) at kernel/log.cc:337
#2  0x00000000005c4bce in Yosys::logv_error (format=0x0, ap=0x7ffff7a1aca0 <main_arena+96>) at kernel/log.cc:343
#3  0x00000000005c4f63 in Yosys::log_error (format=0x1 <error: Cannot access memory at address 0x1>) at kernel/log.cc:392
#4  0x0000000000883a2b in Yosys::log_assert_worker (expr=0x0, file=0x7ffff7a1aca0 <main_arena+96> "\360\206", <incomplete sequence \350>, line=1457, cond=<optimized out>) at ./kernel/log.h:153
#5  Yosys::RTLIL::SigBit::SigBit (this=<optimized out>, wire=<optimized out>) at ./kernel/rtlil.h:1457
#6  (anonymous namespace)::TechmapWorker::techmap_module_worker (this=0x7fffffffd3a8, design=0xe3b5d0, module=<optimized out>, cell=0xe70ba0, tpl=<optimized out>) at passes/techmap/techmap.cc:227
#7  0x000000000087c464 in (anonymous namespace)::TechmapWorker::techmap_module (this=0x7fffffffd3a8, design=0xe3b5d0, module=0xe6fc40, map=0xe67fa0, Python Exception <class 'ValueError'> Cannot find type class std::set<Yosys::RTLIL::Cell*, std::less<Yosys::RTLIL::Cell*>, std::allocator<Yosys::RTLIL::Cell*> >::_Rep_type: 
handled_cells=std::set with 0 elements, Python Exception <class 'ValueError'> Cannot find type const class std::map<Yosys::RTLIL::IdString, std::set<Yosys::RTLIL::IdString, Yosys::RTLIL::sort_by_id_str, std::allocator<Yosys::RTLIL::IdString> >, std::less<Yosys::RTLIL::IdString>, std::allocator<std::pair<Yosys::RTLIL::IdString const, std::set<Yosys::RTLIL::IdString, Yosys::RTLIL::sort_by_id_str, std::allocator<Yosys::RTLIL::IdString> > > > >::_Rep_type: 
celltypeMap=std::map with 1 element, in_recursion=<optimized out>)
    at passes/techmap/techmap.cc:999
#8  0x000000000087676d in (anonymous namespace)::TechmapPass::execute (this=0xe67fa0, args=..., design=0xe3b5d0) at passes/techmap/techmap.cc:1307
```
